first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's lack of direct experience in C++ for capital markets and their primary focus on web/mobile technologies. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new logic or emphasis tied to the demographic change.
